hero.subtitle: Experts in corporate, immigration, and real estate law for international investors and companies.

whycr.title: Why Costa Rica?
whycr.intro: 51,000 km² of nature, two oceans, and Latin America's most enduring democracy.
whycr.card1_text: A bridge between two continents, bathed by two oceans — Costa Rica is home to more than 6% of the planet's biodiversity within just 51,000 km².
whycr.card2_text: The only country in the Americas to abolish its army — over 75 years ago. Those resources now fund universal healthcare and world-class education.
whycr.card3_text: Latin America's most stable democracy, with world-class healthcare and a 99% literacy rate. Simply, the ideal place to invest and live.
